findings.description: Three distinct h2-level source sections (検索結果件数, ページング, 検索結果テーブル) are merged into a single knowledge section s1. The source contains three separate sections marked with `================` underlines: `検索結果件数` (~WebView_ListSearchResultResultCountElement), `ページング` (~WebView_ListSearchResultPagingElement), and `検索結果` (~WebView_ListSearchResultTableElement). Each is substantial in length. Per V3, the knowledge section count (1) does not match the source h2 count (3+).
